rulings.Case Title: DONALD GAUGER et al VS. ALCATEL LUCENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel Further, Verified Responses To Special Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents And Form Interrogatories (Set One) And Outstanding Verifications To Supplemental Responses
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, November 23, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Union Carbide Corporation¿s motion to compel further, verified responses to special interrogatories, request for production of documents and form interrogatories and outstanding verifications to supplemental responses is continued on the court¿s own motion to December 7, 2010 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 220 to provide the parties an opportunity to meet and confer regarding the sufficiency of plaintiffs¿ most recent discovery responses. If all issues are not resolved before then, by 4:30 p.m. on December 6, 2010 the parties must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, the issues that remain in dispute and then appear at the hearing on December 7. = (220/HEK)
